notes.anchor: though not on the best authority
notes.note: Cicero discounts the cheering rumours of his recall because their sources are unreliable; he repeatedly warns himself against false hope.
The Macedonian city, sheltered by the quaestor Plancius, where Cicero spent most of his exile in 58 BC.

notes.anchor: by your work, your counsel, your influence
notes.note: Cicero asks Atticus for practical help (opera, consilio, gratia) rather than further consolation, which now only deepens his grief.
Cicero begs Atticus to support Quintus, who was facing the dangers of his return from Asia at the height of the exile crisis.

notes.anchor: the fourth day before the Kalends of July
notes.note: Counting backward inclusively from 1 July, this is 28 June 58 BC.
